side_effects.description: Extreme dizziness approximately 2 minutes after injection

Skin on fire sensation, sharp chest pain, loss of consciousness twice, fire-like sensation moving from chest to butt and legs, profuse sweating, could barely speak or move, extreme heartburn, heart pounding, chills
Unusual chemical taste in mouth following injection
Suspected severe anaphylaxis with possible blood pressure drop; passed out twice

protocol_notes: OP doubled their dose because they missed a previous injection, using an 8mm 30g pin. Injected before bed. Believes the severe reaction was due to doubling the dose. Had previous milder anaphylaxis reactions (rashes, red neck) from sermorelin. Decided not to continue CJC use. Texted primary care physician.
